title: desmodium lineatum
intro: Desmodium lineatum, also known as Stickseed or Fingerstick, is a perennial legume native to North America, characterized by its distinctive stick-like seed pods. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which are said to aid in the treatment of skin irritations, wounds, and fever. The health benefits of Desmodium lineatum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce pain and swelling, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
